{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Assurance / Quality Control (QA/QC) Manager",
  "description": "Ponticelli Nigeria&nbsp; (PNL) is a subsidiary of Ponticelli Fr&egrave;res Group, a leading European services supplier to companies in the energy, industrial, and infrastructural sectors. PNL specializes in world-class construction and upgrade services for Oil and Gas facilities in the Nigerian market, both onshore and offshore.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance / Quality Control (QA/QC) Manager

Reference: 2025-2270
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type:&nbsp;Permanent
Rotation : 9x3

Job Responsibilities


	The company&nbsp;PONTICELLI NIGERIA, a subsidiary of the Ponticelli Fr&egrave;res Group, is recruiting as part of its projects. You will be involved in construction projects and/or industrial maintenance activities.
	Would you like to develop your experience as a QA/QC Manager (M/F)&nbsp;and help transform the world as part of a family-owned group that works to provide people with what they will always need: energy, health, water, food and security, while sincerely respecting the planet and its employees?
	We invite you to join us on a permanent contract.&nbsp;The position is based in&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Nigeria.


The position we are offering involves the following main responsabilities:
QA/QC Activity:


	Manage and oversee project quality to ensure compliance to codes, standards, regulations, equipment specifications, and QMS requirement;
	Improve quality achievement and performance improvement throughout the organization;
	Manage the development and implementation of the QMS for planning, fabrication, inspection, documentation, and operations activities including:
	
		Plan duties within the QA/QC staff and related work schedules;
		Establish service standards for end users (internal department or external customer);
		Identify and develop QA/QC personnel certification requirements and continuing education/training needs;
		Provide leadership, mentorship, and direction of all QA/QC personnel;
		Take full responsibility for hold-point releases once all QMS functions have been completed and the equipment is ready to go into the next work stage.
	
	



	Develop and implement risk-based inspection (RBI) activities and processes;
	Manage plant integrity through a failure analysis reporting system and following up on recommendations;
	Oversee supervision of all visual inspections and NDE, including 3rd party subcontractors;
	Manage inspection, NDE, and testing plans for new construction, repair work, and alterations;
	Identify and develop solutions to correct inspection function deficiencies;
	Manage construction processes, plant equipment, inspection and NDE personnel certification and QMS internal audits.


Welding Activity:


	Manage all welding procedures and qualifications and testing;
	Analyse welding requirements for specific projects ensuring the any already approved in house procedures are acceptable and generate new procedures specific to project requirements and needs;
	Responsible for the coordination of multiple projects and manage external test laboratories : classify societies and notify bodies with regard to welding procedures their approvals and testing;
	Provide technical support with industry standards and specifications such as ASME Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code, AWS, BS EN, plus any other relevant standards which may be required;
	Manage and control of all materials and consumables for welder testing and procedures;
	Coordinate failure analyses and root cause analysis on welding related issues if required;
	Set up and control and maintenance of a welder data base.


Required Profile


	You have a minimum of 5 years of experience in a similar role.
	You are recognised for your ability to communicate effectively both orally and in writing through memos and engineering reports.
	Professional English is mandatory for the position.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-30",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Ponticelli Nigeria (PNL)"

Quality Assurance / Quality Control (QA/QC) Manager Job at Ponticelli Nigeria (PNL)




        
    

        
        Ponticelli Nigeria  (PNL) is a subsidiary of Ponticelli Frères Group, a leading European services supplier to companies in the energy, industrial, and infrastructural sectors. PNL specializes in world-class construction and upgrade services for Oil and Gas facilities in the Nigerian market, both onshore and offshore.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Assurance / Quality Control (QA/QC) Manager

Reference: 2025-2270
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Permanent
Rotation : 9x3

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The company PONTICELLI NIGERIA, a subsidiary of the Ponticelli Frères Group, is recruiting as part of its projects. You will be involved in construction projects and/or industrial maintenance activities.
	Would you like to develop your experience as a QA/QC Manager (M/F) and help transform the world as part of a family-owned group that works to provide people with what they will always need: energy, health, water, food and security, while sincerely respecting the planet and its employees?
	We invite you to join us on a permanent contract. The position is based in Port Harcourt, Nigeria.


The position we are offering involves the following main responsabilities:
QA/QC Activity:


	Manage and oversee project quality to ensure compliance to codes, standards, regulations, equipment specifications, and QMS requirement;
	Improve quality achievement and performance improvement throughout the organization;
	Manage the development and implementation of the QMS for planning, fabrication, inspection, documentation, and operations activities including:
	
		Plan duties within the QA/QC staff and related work schedules;
		Establish service standards for end users (internal department or external customer);
		Identify and develop QA/QC personnel certification requirements and continuing education/training needs;
		Provide leadership, mentorship, and direction of all QA/QC personnel;
		Take full responsibility for hold-point releases once all QMS functions have been completed and the equipment is ready to go into the next work stage.
	
	



	Develop and implement risk-based inspection (RBI) activities and processes;
	Manage plant integrity through a failure analysis reporting system and following up on recommendations;
	Oversee supervision of all visual inspections and NDE, including 3rd party subcontractors;
	Manage inspection, NDE, and testing plans for new construction, repair work, and alterations;
	Identify and develop solutions to correct inspection function deficiencies;
	Manage construction processes, plant equipment, inspection and NDE personnel certification and QMS internal audits.


Welding Activity:


	Manage all welding procedures and qualifications and testing;
	Analyse welding requirements for specific projects ensuring the any already approved in house procedures are acceptable and generate new procedures specific to project requirements and needs;
	Responsible for the coordination of multiple projects and manage external test laboratories : classify societies and notify bodies with regard to welding procedures their approvals and testing;
	Provide technical support with industry standards and specifications such as ASME Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code, AWS, BS EN, plus any other relevant standards which may be required;
	Manage and control of all materials and consumables for welder testing and procedures;
	Coordinate failure analyses and root cause analysis on welding related issues if required;
	Set up and control and maintenance of a welder data base.


Required Profile


	You have a minimum of 5 years of experience in a similar role.
	You are recognised for your ability to communicate effectively both orally and in writing through memos and engineering reports.
	Professional English is mandatory for the position.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "HR Manager",
  "description": "Ezekiel Properties Management Company&nbsp; is a multifaceted real estate and property solutions company, specializing in luxury property development, mortgage advisory, joint ventures, construction, and agro-estate projects. We combine industry expertise, strategic partnerships, and innovative practices to deliver high-value, sustainable, and profitable real estate solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

About&nbsp;the&nbsp;Role


	We are seeking a structured and performance-driven HR Manager to design, implement, and manage people systems that directly support revenue growth, operational efficiency, and workforce discipline within a fast-paced real estate business.
	This role goes beyond administration &mdash; it requires building a measurable HR engine that aligns recruitment, performance, and workforce management with sales outcomes and organizational targets.


Key&nbsp;Responsibilities
Talent Acquisition &amp; Workforce Planning:


	Develop and execute recruitment strategies for sales, marketing, and operations roles
	Maintain a strong pipeline of pre-qualified candidates, especially for revenue-generating positions
	Reduce time-to-hire while improving quality-of-hire metrics
	Performance Management &amp; Accountability Systems
	Design and implement KPI frameworks across departments (especially sales and customer-facing teams)
	Drive weekly, monthly, and quarterly performance tracking and reporting
	Embed a culture of accountability through structured reviews and measurable outcome.


Training &amp; Capability Development:


	Develop onboarding programs tailored to real estate operations and sales conversion
	Conduct continuous training on client management, closing techniques, and service delivery
	Track training effectiveness and link it to performance improvements.


HR Operations &amp; Compliance:


	Oversee employee records, contracts, attendance, and payroll coordination
	Ensure compliance with labor regulations and internal policies
	Manage disciplinary processes and conflict resolution with professionalism and structure.


Employee Engagement &amp; Retention:


	Design initiatives to improve staff motivation, retention, and productivity
	Implement structured feedback systems and engagement programs
	Align compensation, incentives, and benefits with performance outputs.


Organizational Development:


	Support management in structuring teams for efficiency and scalability
	Advise on workforce optimization, role clarity, and reporting lines
	Drive culture alignment with company vision and performance expectations.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&rsquo;s / Master`s Degree with 3 - 5 years of experience.
	Must be available to resume immediately.

HR Manager Job at Ezekiel Properties Management Company




        
    

        
        Ezekiel Properties Management Company  is a multifaceted real estate and property solutions company, specializing in luxury property development, mortgage advisory, joint ventures, construction, and agro-estate projects. We combine industry expertise, strategic partnerships, and innovative practices to deliver high-value, sustainable, and profitable real estate solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a structured and performance-driven HR Manager to design, implement, and manage people systems that directly support revenue growth, operational efficiency, and workforce discipline within a fast-paced real estate business.
	This role goes beyond administration — it requires building a measurable HR engine that aligns recruitment, performance, and workforce management with sales outcomes and organizational targets.


Key Responsibilities
Talent Acquisition & Workforce Planning:


	Develop and execute recruitment strategies for sales, marketing, and operations roles
	Maintain a strong pipeline of pre-qualified candidates, especially for revenue-generating positions
	Reduce time-to-hire while improving quality-of-hire metrics
	Performance Management & Accountability Systems
	Design and implement KPI frameworks across departments (especially sales and customer-facing teams)
	Drive weekly, monthly, and quarterly performance tracking and reporting
	Embed a culture of accountability through structured reviews and measurable outcome.


Training & Capability Development:


	Develop onboarding programs tailored to real estate operations and sales conversion
	Conduct continuous training on client management, closing techniques, and service delivery
	Track training effectiveness and link it to performance improvements.


HR Operations & Compliance:


	Oversee employee records, contracts, attendance, and payroll coordination
	Ensure compliance with labor regulations and internal policies
	Manage disciplinary processes and conflict resolution with professionalism and structure.


Employee Engagement & Retention:


	Design initiatives to improve staff motivation, retention, and productivity
	Implement structured feedback systems and engagement programs
	Align compensation, incentives, and benefits with performance outputs.


Organizational Development:


	Support management in structuring teams for efficiency and scalability
	Advise on workforce optimization, role clarity, and reporting lines
	Drive culture alignment with company vision and performance expectations.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor’s / Master`s Degree with 3 - 5 years of experience.
	Must be available to resume immediately.

  "description": "Reverse Aesthetics is a premium aesthetic and medical spa based in Victoria Island, Lagos, founded by a renowned and experienced aesthetic physician. The clinic specializes in safe, natural-looking aesthetic enhancements, advanced skin treatments, and non-surgical facial rejuvenation tailored to each client.

Driven by a philosophy of safety, expertise, and subtle excellence, Reverse Aesthetics is known for undetectable results that enhance confidence without altering identity. With a growing footprint across Nigeria, the brand is committed to setting the standard for world-class aesthetic care in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Customer Service Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking to hire a Customer Service Representative (Sales &amp; Conversion) to manage client inquiries, convert leads into bookings, and ensure a seamless and professional client experience.


Responsibilities


	Respond promptly to inquiries via WhatsApp, Instagram, phone, and other platforms
	Convert inquiries in Job Summary to confirmed bookings and drive revenue
	Follow up consistently on pending leads
	Provide accurate information on treatments, pricing, and policies
	Maintain proper booking records and update CRM systems
	Upsell and cross-sell services where appropriate
	Escalate medical or technical questions to the appropriate team


Requirements


	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Sales-driven mindset with ability to convert leads
	Professional, polite, and customer-focused attitude
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple conversations
	Previous experience in customer service or sales is an added advantage.


Remuneration


	150,000 monthly gross salary
	Performance-based growth opportunities.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Customer Service Representative Job at Reverse Aesthetics Limited




        
    

        
        Reverse Aesthetics is a premium aesthetic and medical spa based in Victoria Island, Lagos, founded by a renowned and experienced aesthetic physician. The clinic specializes in safe, natural-looking aesthetic enhancements, advanced skin treatments, and non-surgical facial rejuvenation tailored to each client.

Driven by a philosophy of safety, expertise, and subtle excellence, Reverse Aesthetics is known for undetectable results that enhance confidence without altering identity. With a growing footprint across Nigeria, the brand is committed to setting the standard for world-class aesthetic care in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking to hire a Customer Service Representative (Sales & Conversion) to manage client inquiries, convert leads into bookings, and ensure a seamless and professional client experience.


Responsibilities


	Respond promptly to inquiries via WhatsApp, Instagram, phone, and other platforms
	Convert inquiries in Job Summary to confirmed bookings and drive revenue
	Follow up consistently on pending leads
	Provide accurate information on treatments, pricing, and policies
	Maintain proper booking records and update CRM systems
	Upsell and cross-sell services where appropriate
	Escalate medical or technical questions to the appropriate team


Requirements


	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Sales-driven mindset with ability to convert leads
	Professional, polite, and customer-focused attitude
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple conversations
	Previous experience in customer service or sales is an added advantage.


Remuneration


	150,000 monthly gross salary
	Performance-based growth opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV  to:  [email protected] using “Customer Service Representative Application” as the subject of the email.

title: Job Vacancies at Reverse Aesthetics Limited
content:
Reverse Aesthetics Limited is an integrated aesthetic and healthcare clinic established to provide comprehensive medical and cosmetic services. The company engages in the delivery of cosmetic procedures, including both surgical and non-surgical treatments, aimed at enhancing physical appearance and overall wellbeing.The clinic also offers general healthcare services, ensuring the promotion of preventive and curative health management. In addition, Reverse Aesthetics Limited undertakes hair transplant and restoration procedures, as well as dental cosmetic and general dental treatments, utilizing modern technology and professional expertise to ensure high standards of care and patient satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



1.) Human Resources Manager

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are seeking a highly motivated Human Resources Manager to oversee all aspects of HR functions at Reverse Aesthetics.
	The ideal candidate will drive HR strategy, employee engagement, and talent management while ensuring compliance with labor laws and company policies.


Responsibilities


	Oversee recruitment, onboarding, and offboarding processes
	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures
	Manage employee relations, conflict resolution, and performance management
	Coordinate staff training, development, and performance appraisals
	Maintain accurate HR records, payroll coordination, and benefits administration
	Ensure compliance with labor regulations and company policies
	Foster a positive work culture and employee engagement initiatives
	Collaborate with management to align HR strategy with business objectives
	Track and report on HR-related KPIs, including employee performance, attendance, and compliance metrics
	Ensure all departments comply with company policies, labor laws, and regulatory standards.


Education & Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in HR, Business Administration, or related fields
	Minimum of 3 years of HR experience, preferably in healthcare, services, or corporate environments
	Experience managing employee relations, recruitment, and HR systems


Skills & Competencies:


	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and problem-solving abilities
	Proficiency in HR software and Microsoft Office
	Ability to manage confidential information professionally
	Leadership and team management skills.


Requirements:


	Strong ethical standards and confidentiality
	Proven ability to implement HR policies and programs
	Excellent negotiation and conflict resolution skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 31st May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Human Resource Manager” as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a highly motivated Social Media Manager to oversee and grow our clinic’s online presence.
	This role involves creating engaging content, running and monitoring paid campaigns, and driving brand awareness across all social media platforms.
	The ideal candidate is creative, proactive, and results-driven.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, plan, and execute social media content and campaigns across Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp, and other relevant platforms.
	Create visually appealing graphics, images, and short videos aligned with the brand’s premium image.
	Monitor and respond to comments, messages, and inquiries on social media promptly.
	Maintain consistency in brand voice, aesthetics, and messaging.
	Track engagement metrics, analyze performance, and report results to management.
	Collaborate with marketing, design, and clinic teams for promotions and campaigns.
	Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns to achieve growth and engagement goals.


Skills & Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND / Bachelor`s Degree
	Minimum of 2 years of experience managing social media accounts for brands or businesses.
	trong knowledge of social media platforms, trends, and analytics.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Proficiency in content creation tools such as Canva, Photoshop, or similar.
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
	Ability to work Monday – Saturday, 8:30 a.m. – 6:00 p.m.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 30th May, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio (if available) to: [email protected] using “Social Media Manager” as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking to hire a Customer Service Representative (Sales & Conversion) to manage client inquiries, convert leads into bookings, and ensure a seamless and professional client experience.


Responsibilities


	Respond promptly to inquiries via WhatsApp, Instagram, phone, and other platforms
	Convert inquiries in Job Summary to confirmed bookings and drive revenue
	Follow up consistently on pending leads
	Provide accurate information on treatments, pricing, and policies
	Maintain proper booking records and update CRM systems
	Upsell and cross-sell services where appropriate
	Escalate medical or technical questions to the appropriate team


Requirements


	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Sales-driven mindset with ability to convert leads
	Professional, polite, and customer-focused attitude
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple conversations
	Previous experience in customer service or sales is an added advantage.


Remuneration


	?150,000 monthly gross salary
	Performance-based growth opportunities.


Application Closing Date: 20th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV  to:  [email protected] using “Customer Service Representative Application” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
